title: secretx-pkcs11: implement PKCS#11 HSM backend
description: Implement SecretStore and SigningBackend for PKCS#11 HSMs via the cryptoki crate. Covers Thales Luna, Entrust nShield, YubiKey (ykcs11), SoftHSM2, AWS CloudHSM, and others. URI: secretx://pkcs11/<slot-id>/<object-label>. Library path from ?lib= query param or PKCS11_LIB env var (env var preferred). PIN from PKCS11_PIN env var or ?pin= query param. SecretStore::get reads CKO_DATA object with given label. put creates/overwrites CKO_DATA. SigningBackend::sign calls C_Sign with CKO_PRIVATE_KEY matching label; private key never leaves token. public_key_der reads CKO_PUBLIC_KEY and encodes as DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo. Supported mechanisms: CKM_ECDSA (P-256), CKM_RSA_PKCS_PSS (RSA-2048), CKM_EDDSA (Ed25519 where supported). Integration tests via SoftHSM2 (apt-get install softhsm2). Dep: secretx-core, cryptoki.
